programme.title: Wes & Raf
programme.desc: De WK-selectie is bekend! Koeman heeft de 26 spelers gekozen waarmee Nederland op jacht gaat naar de wereldtitel in Amerika. Wes & Raf reageren op de keuzes van de bondscoach en delen hun ervaringen rondom hun (eerste) oproep voor een eindtoernooi. Wie had er absoluut nog bij moeten zitten? En wat zijn de kansen van Oranje op dit WK?

programme.desc: In aflevering 3 van Wes & Raf blikken Wesley Sneijder en Rafael van der Vaart samen met Noa Vahle terug op hun gezamenlijke jaren in het Nederlands elftal. Van onvergetelijke hoogtepunten op eindtoernooien tot de teleurstellingen die Oranje ook kende: alles komt voorbij. Hoe bijzonder is het om het Oranje-shirt te dragen en je land te vertegenwoordigen op het hoogste podium? programme.title: Kick 't Met On Tour
programme.sub-title: Wat een Europa League finale in Istanbul!
programme.desc: In een nieuwe aflevering van Kick 't Met On Tour: de Europa League-finale in Istanbul! De seizoensafsluiter was er eentje! De Europa League-finale tussen Aston Villa en SC Freiburg. Prachtige goals, prachtige sfeer en een verdiende winnaar. Gesprekken met legendes als Marc Desailly tot de winnaars Ian Maatsen, Amadou Onana en Youri Tielemans. Een finale die we niet snel zullen vergeten.

programme.title: KICK 't MET
programme.desc: Tijjani Noslin deelt zijn onwaarschijnlijke levensverhaal van Subway-medewerker tot smaakmaker in de Serie A bij Lazio Roma. Hij praat openhartig over zijn moeilijke jeugd, de loodzware burn-out die hij onderweg overwon en de extreme druk van de kritische Italiaanse achterban. Tot slot legt de vastberaden aanvaller uit waarom hij zijn droom voor het Nederlands elftal nog niet opgeeft en hoe een emotioneel advies van zijn moeder hem deed besluiten om te blijven wachten op Oranje.

programme.title: KICK 't MET
programme.desc: Kenneth Taylor blikt openhartig terug op zijn overstap van zijn vertrouwde 'warm bad' bij Ajax naar Serie A-topclub Lazio Roma. Hij bespreekt de tactische cultuurschok in Italië, het uiteenvallen van zijn Amsterdamse vriendengroep en de waardevolle lessen die hij meekreeg van Francesco Farioli. Tot slot laat de ambitieuze middenvelder er geen misverstand over bestaan: een toekomstige terugkeer naar zijn grote liefde Ajax sluit hij absoluut niet uit.

programme.desc: Voor het eerst schuiven zeven MotoGP Hall of Fame-leden samen aan tafel. programme.title: Indianapolis 500
programme.desc: Dall'Indianapolis Motor Speedway, Indianapolis, Stati Uniti.

programme.title: Sardegna costa del sud
programme.desc: S7 Ep1 Sardegna costa del sud - Bruno Barbieri arriva in Sardegna, nella Costa del Sud, famosa per le splendide spiagge, per la sua natura incontaminata e per le numerose testimonianze di una storia millenaria.

programme.title: Ep. 19
programme.desc: S2 Ep19 - Due coppie di cuochi amatoriali dovranno trasformare per un giorno la propria casa in un vero Home Restaurant. A giudicarli Giorgio Locatelli ed Enzo Miccio.

programme.title: Ep.03
programme.desc: S3 Ep3 - In questa puntata Renato Bosco ospitera' Davide Civitiello, campione del mondo di pizza napoletana.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA 24 Ep.04
programme.desc: S24 Ep4 Hell's Kitchen USA 24 Ep.04 - Gli chef visitano Stonington, nel Connecticut, per partecipare a una gara a staffetta. Durante il servizio serale, entrambe le squadre danno il meglio di se', sperando che sia sufficiente per rimanere in gara.

programme.title: Ep.05
programme.desc: S24 Ep5 - Gli chef devono combinare ingredienti emblematici di due Stati diversi. Durante la cena, le squadre devono unirsi per servire una sala piena di ospiti illustri.

programme.title: Na Pizza S.3 Ep.04
programme.desc: S3 Ep4 Na Pizza S.3 Ep.04 - In questa puntata Renato Bosco ospitera' Antonio Fusco, giovane talento pugliese che ha portato a Milano il suo innovativo concetto di pizza.

programme.title: Lusso sfrenato ep1
programme.desc: S1 Ep1 Treni - Un viaggio tra piacere, lusso, comfort e bellezza per scoprire alberghi, case, auto, treni, yacht e jet privati dei super ricchi. Scopriamo i treni piu' lussuosi del mondo.

programme.title: Roma: l'eterna
programme.desc: S3 Ep3 Roma: L'eterna - Annagrazia cerca una seconda casa a Roma per le sue due figlie Caterina e Cristiana. Questa volta il campo di battaglia dei nostri due esperti, Giulia e Nicola, sara' la Citta' Eterna.

programme.title: Ep. 19
programme.desc: S2 Ep19 - Due coppie di cuochi amatoriali dovranno trasformare per un giorno la propria casa in un vero Home Restaurant. A giudicarli Giorgio Locatelli ed Enzo Miccio.

programme.title: Sardegna costa del sud
programme.desc: S7 Ep1 Sardegna costa del sud - Bruno Barbieri arriva in Sardegna, nella Costa del Sud, famosa per le splendide spiagge, per la sua natura incontaminata e per le numerose testimonianze di una storia millenaria.

programme.title: Costa Azzurra
programme.desc: S9 Ep6 Costa Azzurra - Chi tra Salvatore, Tina, Vincent e Francesco si aggiudichera' il titolo di miglior ristoratore di cucina italiana della Cote d'Azur, meta turistica esclusiva per eccellenza?

programme.title: Ep.05
programme.desc: S8 Ep5 - I matrimoni di queste quattro spose si tingeranno di verde, colore dell'energia, della natura e della speranza: soprattutto quella di vincere Quattro Matrimoni!

programme.title: I sentimenti cambiano tutto
programme.desc: S1 Ep3 I sentimenti cambiano tutto - Tra storie d'amore in divenire e false piste, il percorso di un concorrente giunge al termine. Due nuovi concorrenti a sorpresa stravolgono immediatamente il gioco.

programme.title: Che l'inganno abbia inizio
programme.desc: S1 Ep4 Che l'inganno abbia inizio - I nuovi arrivati Peter e Jana non perdono tempo e scatenano subito un po' di trambusto. Dopo essere stato votato come il piu' affidabile, Biggy si trova di fronte a un bivio: tradire un membro dell'alleanza o rischiare lui stesso l'eliminazione.

programme.title: Ep. 20
programme.desc: S2 Ep20 - Due coppie di cuochi amatoriali dovranno trasformare per un giorno la propria casa in un vero Home Restaurant. A giudicarli Giorgio Locatelli ed Enzo Miccio.

programme.title: Genova
programme.desc: S7 Ep2 Genova - Genova e' pronta ad accogliere un nuovo esploratore: Bruno Barbieri. 4 Hotel ci accompagnera' tra i carruggi della "Signora del mare" alla ricerca della sua anima piu' autentica.

programme.title: Ep.05
programme.desc: S8 Ep5 - I matrimoni di queste quattro spose si tingeranno di verde, colore dell'energia, della natura e della speranza: soprattutto quella di vincere Quattro Matrimoni!

programme.title: Sardegna
programme.desc: S9 Ep10 Sardegna - Zona della Sardegna con una storia millenaria che affonda le radici tanto in montagna quanto lungo la sua costa meravigliosa, Ogliastra e' il terreno di una sfida tutta al femminile.

programme.title: Gorizia
programme.desc: S9 Ep11 Gorizia - Gorizia e' una citta' che da sempre attinge dalle numerose culture che la influenzano, da quella austroungarica a quella veneziana, da quella slava a quella friulana.

programme.title: Ep.05
programme.desc: S8 Ep5 - I matrimoni di queste quattro spose si tingeranno di verde, colore dell'energia, della natura e della speranza: soprattutto quella di vincere Quattro Matrimoni!

programme.title: Yacht

programme.desc: S3 Ep2 Siracusa: Tra storia e mare - Angelo e Antonella vivono nell'entroterra siciliano, e desiderano acquistare una seconda casa a Siracusa. La sfida di oggi si gioca nel cuore antico della citta', l'isola di Ortigia.

programme.title: Ascoli
programme.desc: S9 Ep4 Ascoli - 4 Ristoranti e' ad Ascoli Piceno! Alessandro e' alla ricerca del miglior ristorante moderno della citta'. Chi vincera' tra Stefano, Eleonora, Emanuele e Giorgio?

programme.title: Irpinia
programme.desc: S9 Ep5 Irpinia - Tra natura lussureggiante e borghi storici, le tradizioni gastronomiche dell'Irpinia sono uniche. Chi tra Jenny, Daniela, Michele e Francesco vincera' questa sfida?

programme.title: Lisbona

programme.title: Dean Ashton
programme.desc: Trascorriamo una giornata con Dean Ashton: classe 1983, ex attaccante del West Ham, ripercorre la sua carriera, interrotta prematuramente a causa di gravi infortuni.

programme.title: Udinese - Juventus
programme.desc: Friulani reduci dal 2-2 contro l'Atalanta. Juve a -1 dalla Champions dopo il 4-0 al Pisa. Un solo ko nelle ultime 15 sfide a Udine, 10 vittorie e 4 pari. TC: Compagnoni-Serena

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain - Arsenal Finale:

programme.title: PSG - Strasburgo

programme.title: Italia - Germania 4-3 (1970)

programme.title: Best of Federer
programme.desc: The only time Roger Federer defeated great rivals Rafael Nadal and Novak Djokovic to win a title, revisit the moment the Swiss reclaimed the ATP Finals crown at The O2 in London.

programme.desc: Having silenced the noise with an assured win at the San Siro midweek, Arne Slot's champions Liverpool return to Anfield for the Premier League visit of Fabian Hurzeler's Brighton. (13.12)

programme.title: SNF: Burnley v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: Saturday Night Football comes from Turf Moor as Scott Parker's struggling Burnley host Fulham. The Clarets have a five-point gap to close in their fight for Premier League survival. (13.12)

programme.title: PL: West Ham v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: Unai Emery's flying Villa, fresh from seeing off the title favourites, visit West Ham this Super Sunday. The Irons narrowly missed out on three points last weekend at Brighton. (14.12)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: Two useful wins in two and Spurs are back on track as Thomas Frank brings his team to the City Ground for a Premier League clash on Super Sunday against Sean Dyche's Forest. (14.12)

programme.title: PL: Crystal Palace v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Capitalising on the leaders' slip up last week, Manchester City go to Selhurst Park next looking to reaffirm their title credentials against a Palace side dreaming of the top four. (14.12)

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: After nine years, the Wear-Tyne derby makes its long-awaited Premier League return on Super Sunday as the Stadium of Light stages the 155th meeting of Sunderland and Newcastle. (14.12)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: Daniel Farke's spirited Leeds arrive at the Gtech Community Stadium for a Super Sunday encounter with Keith Andrews' Brentford, who are four points better off than the visitors. (14.12)

programme.title: MNF: Man Utd v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: It's another Monday Night Football Premier League assignment for Ruben Amorim and Manchester United, who bid to take another stride forward against an out-of-form Bournemouth. (15.12)

programme.title: PL: Bournemouth v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: As those above them continue ticking over, what can Burnley do on the South Coast to improve their chances of Premier League survival? Scott Parker takes his side to Bournemouth. (20.12)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: Sunderland follow a derby day to remember with a visit to Brighton. The hosts, three points adrift of Regis Le Bris' side, lost on the road against Liverpool last weekend. (20.12)

programme.title: PL: Man City v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Hitting their stride at a pivotal time in the season, Manchester City are back at the Etihad to take on West Ham. City can temporarily leapfrog leaders Arsenal with a win. (20.12)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Wolves, desperately unlucky in the capital last week, face Brentford in the Premier League. Jordan Henderson netted for the Bees in his side's one-all draw with Leeds previously. (20.12)

programme.title: SNF: Spurs v Liverpool
programme.desc: A big test awaits for Thomas Frank and Spurs after a limp display against Forest as the champions Liverpool, looking to go six unbeaten, visit the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. (20.12)

programme.title: SNF: Everton v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: Lining up at the Hill Dickinson Stadium for the last time this year, Everton host Arsenal on Saturday Night Football. The Gunners needed two own goals to beat Wolves last weekend. (20.12)

programme.title: SNF: Leeds v Crystal Palace Hlts
programme.desc: On Saturday Night Football, Leeds attempt to extend an unbeaten Premier League run stretching three games with high-flying Crystal Palace the visitors at Elland Road. (20.12)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v Man Utd Hlts
programme.desc: Villa target a 10th consecutive win in all competitions on Super Sunday as the focus turns to Manchester United, who come from an exhilarating eight-goal thriller earlier this week. (21.12)

programme.title: MNF: Fulham v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: Lifting themselves clear of the drop zone with a 3-0 win over Spurs, it's Fulham at Craven Cottage next on Monday Night Football for Sean Dyche's ever-improving Nottingham Forest. (22.12)

programme.title: FNF: Man Utd v Newcastle
programme.desc: Friday Night Football comes from Old Trafford as Manchester United take on Newcastle in the Premier League's sole Boxing Day fixture. This time last year, the Magpies won here 2-0. (26.12)

programme.title: PL: West Ham v Fulham
programme.desc: Searching for a much-needed win, West Ham host in-form London rivals Fulham. The Hammers sit in the drop zone with just 11 points to their name following a 3-0 defeat at City. (27.12)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Bournemouth
programme.desc: Coming from a 2-0 win at Molineux, with two goals from Keane Lewis-Potter, Brentford take on Bournemouth, whose winless run stretched to eight matches previously. (27.12)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Everton
programme.desc: Having ended a seven-game losing run to claim a precious point on the South Coast, can Burnley add three this time with the Premier League visit of Everton to Turf Moor? (27.12)

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Brighton
programme.desc: Spending Christmas at the summit, title hopefuls Arsenal take on a Brighton side winless in their last four matches. Viktor Gyokores netted for the Gunners in a win over Everton. (27.12)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Wolves
programme.desc: Bringing three points home from the capital, but at the cost of injury to their record signing, the champions Liverpool welcome Wolves to Anfield in the Premier League. (27.12)

programme.title: SNF: Chelsea v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: It's a Christmas cracker at Stamford Bridge as the Premier League's form team Aston Villa - seven points clear of Enzo Maresca's Chelsea - target an incredible 11th straight win. (27.12)

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: Four unbeaten in the top flight, including a 4-1 demolition of Palace, Leeds go to Sunderland on Super Sunday. The Black Cats earned a point on the road against Brighton last week. (28.12)

programme.title: PL: Crystal Palace v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: For the final time this year, Crystal Palace and Tottenham Hotspur take to the pitch for Premier League action as the two London rivals meet at Selhurst Park on Super Sunday. (28.12)

programme.desc: A round-up of the leading stories and features with Sky's Formula 1 presenters during the 2026 Chinese Grand Prix in Shanghai.

programme.title: F1 Explained...
programme.desc: A round-up of the F1 Explained series, as Sky F1's leading voices unpack the intricacies of the sport.

programme.title: The Best of F1 2021
programme.desc: It's one of the most famous events in sport - the 2021 Monaco Grand Prix arrives in spectacular style from the Circuit de Monaco. Lewis Hamilton was the winner at its last outing in 2019.

programme.title: The Best of F1 2021
programme.desc: The 2021 Azerbaijan Grand Prix, held at the Baku City Circuit. Held for just the fourth time this year, Mercedes' Valtteri Bottas was the winner at the last event in 2019.

programme.title: The Best of F1 2021
programme.desc: The 2021 French Grand Prix arrives from Circuit Paul Ricard in Le Castellet. Max Verstappen starts on pole position after a thrilling qualifying session.

programme.title: The Best of F1 2021
programme.desc: The 2021 Formula 1 season begins its two-race stint in Austria as the Styrian Grand Prix arrives from the Red Bull Ring. This is just the second time this race has taken place.

programme.title: British F1 Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's lights out at Silverstone. Kimi Antonelli and Charles Leclerc form the front row with Lewis Hamilton, chasing a 10th British Grand Prix win, in third. George Russell starts P4. (05.07)

programme.title: Ted's Notebook: Britain
programme.desc: Ted Kravitz is live following the British Grand Prix, as he shares his thoughts on the race while gathering reactions from the paddock.

programme.title: At Home with Liam Lawson Pt1
programme.desc: Find out what Racing Bulls driver Liam Lawson does on a day off in this two-part special, as the New Zealander shows his breakfast, workout, life in Monaco and golfing skills. (1 of 2)

programme.title: Indycar NXT: Race 1
programme.desc: The next generation of IndyCar stars line up on the grid ahead of race one of the weekend in Lexington.

programme.title: Indycar NXT: Race 2
programme.desc: The next generation of IndyCar stars line up on the grid for the second race of the weekend in Lexington, Ohio.

programme.title: Indycar Highlights
programme.desc: It's NTT IndyCar Series race day in Lexington as the 2026 field of drivers line up on the grid for the Honda Indy 200 at Mid-Ohio. (05.07)

programme.title: British F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Silverstone. Kimi Antonelli and Charles Leclerc form the front row with Lewis Hamilton, chasing a 10th British Grand Prix win, in third. George Russell starts P4. (05.07)

programme.title: At Home with Liam Lawson Pt2
programme.desc: Find out what Racing Bulls driver Liam Lawson does on a day off in this two-part special, as the New Zealander shows his breakfast, workout, life in Monaco and golfing skills. (2 of 2)

programme.title: British F1 Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's lights out at Silverstone. Kimi Antonelli and Charles Leclerc form the front row with Lewis Hamilton, chasing a 10th British Grand Prix win, in third. George Russell starts P4. (05.07)

programme.title: Ted's Notebook: Britain
programme.desc: Ted Kravitz is live following the British Grand Prix, as he shares his thoughts on the race while gathering reactions from the paddock.

programme.title: Classic F1 Races 2008
programme.desc: A chance to relive the 2008 British Grand Prix from Silverstone. McLaren driver Heikki Kovalainen was the fastest in qualifying, securing his very first Formula 1 pole position.

programme.title: Classic F1 Races 2012
programme.desc: A look back at the 2012 British Grand Prix at Silverstone. Ferrari's Fernando Alonso topped the Drivers' Championship going into this race.
